response:
Let the first phase need x hours.
The second phase needs 2x hours.
The third phase needs 4x hours.
The fourth phase needs 8x hours.
The fifth phase needs 16x hours.
Sum of all phases equals 31x.
We solve 31x equals 310.
Thus x equals 10 hours.
Phase one needs 10 hours.
Phase two needs 20 hours.
Phase three needs 40 hours.
Phase four needs 80 hours.
Phase five needs 160 hours.
Original total time was 20 weeks.
Each phase now takes 1.5 times longer.
New total time is 30 weeks.
This change affects overall schedule.
No phase order shifts at all.
Fortune favors those who plan well.
The team must adapt to this delay.
